name: searchfetch
description: Fault-tolerant MCP Server for Stealth Web Search and Fetching

scripts.test: npm run test:js && npm run test:py
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:py
scripts.lint:py: uv run ruff check server.py test_*.py
scripts.format: npx prettier --write "*.js" "*.json" "*.md" && uv run ruff format server.py test_*.py
scripts.format:check: npx prettier --check "*.js" "*.json" "*.md" && uv run ruff format --check server.py test_*.py
